title: SnowDamage
description: A simple and effective plugin, allowing you to make snowballs hurt.
body:
# DEPRECATED This plugin will not receive further updates. SnowDamage, a plugin allowing you to change the damage of snowballs with just one command. **/snowdamage | Allows you to change the snowball damage.** * Usage: /snowdamage * Effect: Sets given number as the damage dealt by snowballs. * Permission: ``lolcatz.snowdamage.change`` ![Header Image](https://i.ibb.co/Z24yHwT/image-2022-12-04-213428566.png) Config: ``` ### LOLCATZ SnowDamage ### # Configures the snowball damage. # Set 0 to deactivate. SnowballDamage: 0.0 ``` Planned features: - Support for language files + Config & command for language change. - Support for custom prefix + command for prefix change. No useless features, no bStats. Have fun!
[Get it on SpigotMC!](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/106582/)
